title: PowerShell Troubleshooting Lab
description: Capstone lab combining navigation, filtering, services, logs, remoting, and error handling for real-world Windows troubleshooting.

tasks.prompt: Verify the current working directory before starting diagnostics.
tasks.explanation: Knowing your current path prevents accidental changes in the wrong folder.

tasks.hint: Use Test-Path with the logs directory.
tasks.explanation: Test-Path quickly confirms a directory is present before reading files.

tasks.prompt: Search all .log files under 'C:\Logs' for lines containing 'ERROR'.
tasks.hint: Use Select-String with a wildcard path and pattern.
tasks.explanation: Select-String scans multiple log files for failure signatures.

tasks.prompt: List all services that are currently stopped.
tasks.hint: Pipe Get-Service to Where-Object filtering Stopped status.
tasks.explanation: Stopped services often explain application outages on Windows hosts.

tasks.hint: Use Restart-Service with the spooler service name.
tasks.explanation: Restarting spooler is a common fix for stuck print jobs.

tasks.prompt: Show the top 5 processes sorted by CPU usage descending.
tasks.hint: Sort by CPU and select the first 5 results.
tasks.explanation: High CPU processes are frequent culprits in performance incidents.
Stop-Process clears stuck user applications during triage.

tasks.prompt: Retrieve the 10 newest Error events from the System log.
tasks.hint: Query System log with -EntryType Error and -Newest 10.
tasks.explanation: System log errors reveal driver, disk, and service failures.

tasks.prompt: Search the Application log for events with Id 1000 using Get-WinEvent and a FilterHashtable.
tasks.hint: Use Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable with LogName and Id.
tasks.explanation: Event ID 1000 commonly indicates application crash details.

tasks.prompt: Display free disk space for all volumes as a table.
tasks.hint: Use Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem piped to Format-Table.
tasks.explanation: Low disk space causes logging failures and service crashes.

tasks.prompt: Test WinRM connectivity to the server 'DC01'.
tasks.explanation: Remote diagnostics require working WinRM connectivity.

tasks.prompt: Run 'Get-Service' on remote computer 'DC01' via Invoke-Command.
tasks.hint: Use Invoke-Command with a Get-Service script block.
tasks.explanation: Invoke-Command collects remote state without an interactive session.

tasks.prompt: Try to read 'missing.cfg'; on failure output 'Config missing' (try/catch).
tasks.hint: Wrap Get-Content in try/catch with a friendly message.
tasks.explanation: Graceful error handling keeps troubleshooting scripts running.

tasks.prompt: Export the 50 newest System log events to 'C:\Reports\system-events.xml'.
tasks.explanation: Export-Clixml preserves rich event objects for offline analysis.

tasks.prompt: Start a transcript of the session saved to 'C:\Reports\session.log'.
tasks.explanation: Transcripts document commands and output for post-incident review.
